name: Creole Seafood Gumbo
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a dark roux of the butter and flour over low heat, stirring constantly.
2. Gradually add liquid, okra, tomatoes, onion, pepper, Tabasco, thyme, and bay leaf to the roux.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Add seafood (shrimp, crabmeat, oyster) and cook, covered, for an additional 10 to 15 minutes until seafood is cooked through.
5. Remove the bay leaf before serving in soup bowls with a mound of hot rice at the center.
